## Evidence (required)

1. **Verification run** — command(s) or HTTP checks (exit code / status); paste redacted snippets only.
2. **Commits** — feature branch SHAs or “this PR” + base ref.
3. **Paperclip** — if applicable: final comment summary + note that `PATCH` set `done` (run ID optional: `PAPERCLIP_RUN_ID`).
